message:
feat(deps): add frankensearch-embed local path dependency for hash-based embedding

Add frankensearch-embed as a workspace path dependency with only the
"hash" feature enabled and default features disabled. This enables
CASS to leverage frankensearch's content-hashing infrastructure for
deduplication and similarity matching without pulling in the full
transformer embedding stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
